title: Five of the Main Challenges Awaiting Andy Burnham When He Becomes Prime Minister
summary_full: Andy Burnham, who is set to enter Downing Street on Monday, faces a long and daunting list of issues. Here are some of the most urgent.
summary_public: Andy Burnham, who is set to enter Downing Street on Monday, faces a long and daunting list of issues. Here are some of the most urgent.
